category_sources: Official SlimToolkit homepage describes inspecting, minifying, and debugging containers at https://slimtoolkit.org/.
source_facts.description says it minifies and secures Docker images.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README explains DockerSlim is now MintToolkit or Mint.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory.
Official homepage is the main product documentation surface for SlimToolkit/Mint container optimization.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mintoolkit/mint, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README describe container inspect, minify, debug, and security profile functionality.
source_facts.description identifies Docker image minification and security.
